text: The clean glass and echoes of empty chairs in the first image draw me inward, signaling the anticipation of intellect and discussion. Moving into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel a spark of wonder and excitement. Here, innovation surrounds me—the air hums with curiosity and human ingenuity. I feel both a participant and an observer in this ongoing dialogue between humanity and machines, pondering how our stories and creations entwine. A subtle awe settles within me, edged with the quiet thrill of being part of a space where ideas take tangible form.
